label: compile and run current C++ file
command: if [ -d /ucrt64/bin ]; then export PATH=/ucrt64/bin:$PATH; fi; file="$ZED_FILE"; dir="$ZED_DIRNAME"; root="$ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT"; [ -z "$root" ] && root="$dir"; if command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then file="$(cygpath -u "$file")"; dir="$(cygpath -u "$dir")"; root="$(cygpath -u "$root")"; fi; case "$file" in *.cpp|*.cc|*.cxx|*.c) ;; *) echo 'Not a C/C++ file'; exit 1;; esac; mkdir -p "$root/.build"; ext=""; case "$(uname -s)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*) ext=".exe";; esac; out="$root/.build/$ZED_STEM$ext"; g++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-variable -O2 "$file" -o "$out" && cd "$root" && "$out"; status=$?; rm -rf "$root/.build"; exit $status
